name: Dodoco's Duet
description:
A special drink brimming with the sweet and tangy flavors of passion. This is a masterpiece that was crafted for Klee with "Fairweather Frolic" serving as the creative inspiration when The Honorary Knight's Cocktail Shack was in operation.
The original "Fairweather Frolic" had a purple hue, but it wasn't quite cheerful enough. So let's add a touch of sunshine and a few fluffy clouds to capture that warm, happy feeling!
Sweetness is a must, but staying healthy matters too. That's why the juice was carefully chosen with Master Jean's approval, with sweetness coming from Bulle Fruits.
And most important of all — the Dodoco Candy! Its tasty magic has to be placed right at the center of the "clouds"!
Said Klee: "Good weather, good mood, Dodoco will sing, and Klee will join in!" This is why this drink was named "Dodoco's Duet."
